actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Upload the `.zip` extension file directly to the hidden file input (do not click the upload button to prevent OS dialog blocks)
actions.description: Upload the .zip extension file directly to the hidden file input
Click the confirm/primary button in the visible modal dialog

actions.instruction: Wait for the uploaded extension card to appear
actions.description: Wait for the newly installed extension to be visible in the extensions list.

actions.instruction: Verify the new extension card is visible in the grid
actions.description: Verify the new extension card is visible in the extensions grid
